2604.15871.title: UniEditBench: A Unified and Cost-Effective Benchmark for Image and Video Editing via Distilled MLLMs
2604.15871.paper_summary: The evaluation of visual editing models remains fragmented across methods and modalities. Existing benchmarks are often tailored to specific paradigms, making fair cross-paradigm comparisons difficult, while video editing lacks reliable evaluation benchmarks. Furthermore, common automatic metrics often misalign with human preference, yet directly deploying large multimodal models (MLLMs) as evaluators incurs prohibitive computational and financial costs. We present UniEditBench, a unified benchmark for image and video editing that supports reconstruction-based and instruction-driven methods under a shared protocol. UniEditBench includes a structured taxonomy of nine image operations (Add, Remove, Replace, Change, Stroke-based, Extract, Adjust, Count, Reorder) and eight video operations, with coverage of challenging compositional tasks such as counting and spatial reordering. To enable scalable evaluation, we distill a high-capacity MLLM judge (Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B Instruct) into lightweight 4B/8B evaluators that provide multi-dimensional scoring over structural fidelity, text alignment, background consistency, naturalness, and temporal-spatial consistency (for videos). Experiments show that the distilled evaluators maintain strong agreement with human judgments and substantially reduce deployment cost relative to the teacher model. UniEditBench provides a practical and reproducible protocol for benchmarking modern visual editing methods. Our benchmark and the associated reward models are publicly available at https://github.com/wesar1/UniEditBench.
2604.15871.paper_summary_zh: 視覺編輯模型的評估在方法和模式上仍然是碎片化的。現有的基準通常針對特定的範式進行調整，這使得跨範式的公平比較變得困難，而視頻編輯則缺乏可靠的評估基準。此外，常見的自動指標往往與人類偏好不一致，但直接部署大型多模態模型（MLLMs）作為評估者會產生高昂的計算和財務成本。我們提出了 UniEditBench，一個統一的圖像和視頻編輯基準，支持基於重建和指令驅動的方法，並在共享協議下運行。UniEditBench 包含九種圖像操作（添加、移除、替換、變更、基於筆劃、提取、調整、計數、重排序）和八種視頻操作的結構化分類法，涵蓋了計數和空間重排序等具有挑戰性的組合任務。為了實現可擴展的評估，我們將高容量的 MLLM 評估者（Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B Instruct）提煉為輕量級的 4B/8B 評估者，這些評估者提供多維度的評分，涵蓋結構保真度、文本對齊、背景一致性、自然性和時間-空間一致性（針對視頻）。實驗顯示，提煉的評估者與人類判斷保持強一致性，並顯著降低了相對於教師模型的部署成本。UniEditBench 提供了一個實用且可重複的基準協議，用於評估現代視覺編輯方法。我們的基準和相關的獎勵模型可在 https://github.com/wesar1/UniEditBench 上公開獲得。
2604.15871.author: Lifan Jiang et.al.
2604.15871.authors: Lifan Jiang, Tianrun Wu, Yuhang Pei, Chenyang Wang, Boxi Wu, Deng Cai
